artPrompt: Two nearly identical small goblin clerks face each other across a beige counter, one turning away with a regretful gesture, recusing itself, soft cyan light catching their hunched shoulders, a glowing illegible disclosure paper drifting between them, towering hazy cabinets behind dissolving into ivory mist, a tender melancholic standoff softened by chalky diffuse light, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Declared Conflict of Interest
text: Target creature can't block this turn and must recuse itself from combat. If it was attacking, it stops attacking and files a disclosure instead.
flavorText: "I cannot, in good conscience, fight my own cousin," said the goblin to its identical cousin.
